title: Full Heal Potion
description: Adds a powerful Full Heal Potion... But it's locked deep within the dangerous Ancient City.
body:
# Description
Adds a unique Full Heal potion to Ancient City chests, replacing the Regeneration potion that was there before, to add extra reward to exploring this dangerous structure. This potion is used in 4 ticks (0.2 seconds), so be careful not to misclick it and waste it. The item can be moved to vanilla and will still work the same, but can't be found in chests then.

# Versions
Currently supports Java 1.21.5 to 1.21.11.

# Compatibility
Only changes the Ancient City chest, so it should work with any pack that doesn't.
